productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Zurigo White Blue Shoe
description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style, the lotto Zurigo is designed to keep your feet dry and comfortable all day. Slip into these trainers for a healthy ride or chill out in them in urban settings.Upper Synthetic and mesh upper for extended durability and to keep the feet fresh and dry all day Synthetic lace-up system for snug Fit for durability Cushioned collar and padded tongue for enhanced grip and comfort Extended rubber outsole embedded into the toe box for superior shock absorption Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and enhanced shock absorption, providing great comfort Outsole Carbon rubber outsole in multi-directional pattern for enhanced grip on any terrain Dedicated rubber lugs with extra patch of rubber around the periphery of the heel for superior traction Scoop at the heel counter for added cushioning and impact protection Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
